𝗘𝗟𝗜𝗢 | A terminal-based file manager for efficient file browsing, previewing, and management within the command-line interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A terminal-based file manager for efficient file browsing, previewing, and management within the command-line interface.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Three-pane layout (Places, Files, Preview)
✅ Rich file previews (text, code, documents, media)
✅ Inline image rendering in supported terminals
✅ Customizable Places and devices
✅ Quick actions (Go-to, Open With, copy-to-clipboard)
✅ Trash management
✅ Keyboard and mouse navigation
✅ Grid and list views
✅ Fuzzy search
✅ Zoxide integration
✅ Shell integration
✅ Theming


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 572 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 18 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Elio is a fast, feature-rich terminal file manager written in Rust. It offers a three-pane layout for efficient navigation, supports rich file previews including inline images in compatible terminals, and provides essential file management features like bulk actions, trash support, and customizable themes.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/elio-fm/elio

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗥𝗢𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗢_𝗢𝗥𝗜𝗚𝗜𝗡 | Enabling hobbyists and researchers to build, train, and deploy their own functional humanoid robots through open-source hardware designs, software, and documentation.  🌟 Rising Fast!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling hobbyists and researchers to build, train, and deploy their own functional humanoid robots through open-source hardware designs, software, and documentation.
📅 Created: Dec 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✅ Complete R&D Process Documentation
✅ Enables independent DIY assembly
✅ Open-source training and deployment code for walking and running
✅ ROS2 and Isaac Sim/Lab integration
✅ Python and C++ development

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ROBOTO_ORIGIN is a fully open-source DIY humanoid robot project that provides the complete R&D process, including structure, electronics, and training code. It aims to enable individuals to build and operate a running and jumping humanoid robot through DIY assembly and provided open-source resources.

𝗠𝗜𝗘𝗥𝗨 | Bypassing internet censorship through encrypted network proxying.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Bypassing internet censorship through encrypted network proxying.
📅 Created: Sep 2021 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Provides SOCKS5, HTTP, and HTTPS proxy interfaces
✅ Uses XChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption with username, password, and system time-based keys
✅ Implements random padding and replay attack detection to evade censorship
✅ Supports multiple users on a single server
✅ Supports both IPv4 and IPv6
✅ Does not use TLS, eliminating the need for domain registration


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 206 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Mieru is a Go-based proxy tool designed to bypass censorship by providing secure, encrypted tunnels for SOCKS5, HTTP, and HTTPS traffic. It utilizes strong encryption and anti-detection techniques to evade network filtering, making it difficult for censors to identify and block.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/enfein/mieru

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗗𝗢𝗪𝗕𝗥𝗢𝗞𝗘𝗥 | Aggregating and visualizing diverse, real-time public global intelligence data in a single interface for analysts, researchers, and radio operators, with capabilities for AI-assisted correlation.  📈 Growing!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Aggregating and visualizing diverse, real-time public global intelligence data in a single interface for analysts, researchers, and radio operators, with capabilities for AI-assisted correlation.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time multi-domain OSINT telemetry aggregation
✅ Unified dark-ops map interface
✅ 60+ live intelligence feeds
✅ Aircraft, ships, satellites, conflict zones, CCTV, GPS jamming, mesh radio, geopolitical events tracking
✅ Telegram OSINT (public channel previews)
✅ Server-side recon toolkit (DNS, WHOIS, BGP, IP sweep)
✅ Cyber threat feeds (malware/C2, CISA KEV)
✅ Multiple visual modes (DEFAULT, SATELLITE, FLIR, NVG, CRT)
✅ Country dossiers, head-of-state lookup, entity-graph expansion
✅ Sentinel-2 satellite imagery integration
✅ No accounts, product telemetry, or analytics
✅ Self-hosted backend with SSRF guards and local-operator auth


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 9.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.4K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ShadowBroker is a decentralized, real-time geospatial intelligence platform that aggregates data from over 60 live intelligence feeds into a unified dark-ops map interface. It visualizes aircraft, ships, satellites, conflict zones, and more, with options for AI agent integration for advanced data correlation.

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧
